usage: editRotate [-help] [-mode {group single}] [-rotate_point {x y}] {-flip {MX MY} | -rotate {R90 R180 R270}}

options.name: -flip
options.description: Flip wire/via by MX or MY

options.name: -mode
options.description: Rotate wires/vias as one group or one by one

options.name: -rotate_point
options.description: Specifies user point to rotate around
